name: Noir Investigation
description: Gritty mystery campaign where each clue reveals a deeper conspiracy.

text_areas.logline: A routine case spirals into a city-wide conspiracy.
text_areas.setting: Rain-soaked streets ruled by corrupt institutions and hidden patrons.
text_areas.main_objective: Unmask the conspiracy before it silences every witness.
text_areas.stakes: Truth dies, and the city’s future is bought by blood.

arcs.name: Arc I — The Wrong Corpse
arcs.summary: The first victim is connected to multiple power brokers.
arcs.objective: Find the missing ledger and survive retaliation.

arcs.name: Arc II — Smoke and Mirrors
arcs.summary: False leads and betrayals fracture trusted alliances.
arcs.objective: Separate fabricated evidence from real leverage.

arcs.name: Arc III — City of Ash
arcs.summary: The mastermind forces a final public reckoning.
arcs.objective: Expose the network and choose what justice means.
